triggers.description: Whenever one or more other permanents phase out and whenever one or more other cards are put into exile from anywhere, put a time counter on CARDNAME.
Whenever one or more other permanents phase out and whenever one or more other cards are put into exile from anywhere, put a time counter on CARDNAME.
Whenever CARDNAME attacks, it deals damage equal to the number of time counters on it to any target. If a creature dealt damage this way would die this turn, exile it instead.
